In the UAE, UBO filings require entities to identify owners with ≥25% control, maintain registers, and submit declarations to authorities like the Ministry of Economy or free zones annually or upon changes. Non-compliance incurs fines up to AED 1M.

AML regulations under Federal Decree-Law No. 20/2018 mandate customer due diligence, suspicious transaction reporting, and risk assessments for financial institutions and DNFBPs.

Gupta Accountants offers UBO and AML compliance services, including filings and advisory.

TKO promoted Canelo vs. Crawford on Netflix, a fight worth hundreds of millions of dollars, without having to amend the Ali Act.

So why the need for the UBO? To use market position with TKO's multi-monopoly to use a government carve-out to isolate all available investment cash.

The bitter irony of UBO marketing is that it's an inverted spin of the "public option" during Obamacare negotiations.

Instead of giving Americans a government health care option, MAABRA/TKO is giving boxing a corporatized carve out from current protections by screaming "choice!"
